memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Thomas Stanley, 1st Baron Stanley, KG HOPE, W. H. St. John, The Stall Plates of the Knights of the Order of the Garter 1348 – 1485: A Series of Ninety Full-Sized Coloured Facsimiles with Descriptive Notes and Historical Introductions, Westminster: Archibald Constable and Company LTD, 1901. “ Sir Thomas Stanley, Lord Stanley, K.G. 1457-1458…the arms, quarterly: 1 and 4, gold on a chief indented azure three silver plates (for Lathom), quartering silver on a bend azure three stags' heads gold (for Stanley); 2 and 3, gules three legs armed and flexed in triangle (for the Kingdom of Man)... ” Lord Stanley's stall plate remains intact within the twenty-fifth stall, on the Sovereign's side of the chapel.
Source - Wikipedia

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle於1507年5月25日出生在英國藍卡爾宏比 卡素時，他的父親Edward Stanley43歲，母親Elizabeth Vaughan56歲。他於1528年4月2日與Lady Mary Brandon在英國藍卡爾梅林結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1560年8月18日在英國藍卡爾宏比享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle于1507年5月25日出生在英国藍卡爾宏比 卡素时，他的父亲Edward Stanley43岁，母亲Elizabeth Vaughan56岁。他于1528年4月2日与Lady Mary Brandon在英国藍卡爾梅林结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1560年8月18日在英国藍卡爾宏比享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle was born on 25 May 1507, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, his father, Edward Stanley, was 43 and his mother, Elizabeth Vaughan, was 56. He married Lady Mary Brandon on 2 April 1528, in Melling, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 18 August 1560, in Hornby, Lancashire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle est né le 25 mai 1507, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Edward Stanley, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Vaughan, avait 56 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Brandon le 2 avril 1528, à Melling, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 août 1560, à Hornby, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Lady Mary Brandon il 2 aprile 1528, nel Melling, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagleが1507年5月25日にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルで生まれた時，父Edward Stanleyは43歳，母Elizabeth Vaughanは56歳であった。1528年4月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアメリングでLady Mary Brandonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1560年8月18日にイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビーで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle(이)가 1507년 5월 25일 영국 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Stanley(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Vaughan(은)는 56세였다. 그는 1528년 4월 2일 영국 랭카실르 멜링에서 Lady Mary Brandon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 8월 18일 영국 랭카실르 호른비에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle nasceu em 25 de maio de 1507, em Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward Stanley, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Vaughan, tinha 56 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Brandon em 2 de abril de 1528, em Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de agosto de 1560, em Hornby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Stanley 2nd Baron Mounteagle родился 25 мая 1507 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward Stanley было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Vaughan, 56. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Brandon 2 апреля 1528 г. в местности меллинг, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 18 августа 1560 г. в местности хаурнби, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Mary Brandon el 2 de abril de 1528, en Melling, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de agosto de 1560, en Hornby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
